p: Instructions: Fill in values in the inverse sine function below to change the plot. Try to find values that will make it line up with the plot of y=\cos^{-1}(x).
graph:
$arcs
y=$A\cdot\sin^{-1}(x)+$B
$cosy $arcc
y=\cos^{-1}(x)
Graph of the inverse cosine function overlayed with the graph of the inverse sine function as well as x equals sine of y.
p: What values can you use to make these curves match? What kinds of transformations should you apply to the y=\sin^{-1}(x) function in order to make it match y=\cos^{-1}(x)?
